project.name: SylphxAI GitHub Organization Configuration
project.summary: Organization-level GitHub configuration, community health files, reusable workflows, workflow templates, and shared GitHub Actions for SylphxAI repositories.
goals: Provide default community health files, profile documentation, issue templates, pull request templates, brand/company references, and repository templates for the SylphxAI GitHub organization.
Provide reusable GitHub workflows and shared actions that repositories can call through documented public workflow/action surfaces.
Keep organization-level GitHub conventions centralized so individual repositories do not copy or fork shared process.
nonGoals: Own product-specific code, package source, runtime behavior, deployment manifests, or project-specific documentation for individual repositories.
Own repo-local project goals, lifecycle states, boundaries, or delivery evidence; those facts belong in each repository's .doctrine/project.json.
Bypass repository branch protection, merge queues, or required status checks in consuming repositories.

owns.name: organization-community-health
owns.description: Default code of conduct, contributing guide, security policy, issue templates, pull request template, and organization profile documentation.

owns.name: shared-github-automation
owns.description: Reusable GitHub workflows, workflow templates, and composite actions used by SylphxAI repositories through GitHub public workflow/action references.

owns.name: organization-brand-and-templates
owns.description: Company information, brand guidance, license template, README template, package metadata template, and workflow rollout templates.

doesNotOwn: Repo-local project manifests, repository goals, product boundaries, package APIs, or runtime behavior.
Branch-protection state, required checks, merge queues, deployments, releases, or production proof for individual repositories.
Customer-specific or product-specific behavior that belongs in product repositories, adapters, or tenant configuration.

allowedDependencies.surface: Changesets GitHub Action used for release intent detection, version PR generation, changelog handling, and GitHub Release creation.
Bun setup action used by reusable npm release workflows before install, build, package-manager packing, tarball audit, and audited tarball publication.

forbiddenCouplings: Do not encode one repository's product-specific process as an organization default.
Do not make this repository the source of truth for another repository's project goal, lifecycle, boundary, release proof, or adoption gaps.
Do not weaken consumer repository gates by replacing required checks, merge queues, or production proof with advisory templates.

delivery.deployPath: Merged changes to main are consumed directly by GitHub as organization defaults, reusable workflows, workflow templates, and composite actions. There is no separate runtime deploy for this repository.
delivery.productionProof: Proof is GitHub main readback plus successful local project-control CI. Reusable workflow or action changes also require successful consumer use of the changed public surface.

gaps.description: Repository has local project-control CI, but main branch protection does not require it yet. Organization ruleset adoption remains a separate infrastructure decision.
